channel.title: XKey Updates
channel.description: XKey - Vietnamese Input Method for macOS

item.title: Version 1.2.23 (Build 20260606)
item.description:
What's New

fix(sync): re-enable iCloud KVS on Developer ID + refine sync UI

Root cause of the launch SIGKILL was a code-signing mismatch, not a macOS

platform ban: the app was signed with a Developer ID cert absent from the

embedded provisioning profile's DeveloperCertificates, so amfid rejected the

restricted ubiquity-kvstore-identifier entitlement with -413 "No matching

profile found".

  • build_release.sh: pin signing identity by SHA-1 (self-healing resolution:

env override -> cert derived from embedded profile -> known-good fallback),

ad-hoc build then re-sign with the authorized Developer ID profile, and

PlistBuddy-based entitlement stripping for the sync-disabled control build.

  • XKeyRelease.entitlements: re-add com.apple.developer.ubiquity-kvstore-identifier.
  • iCloudSyncManager: correct the misleading comment to reflect the true cause.
  • BackupRestoreSection: move the cloud icon to the trailing side of the toggle

and shrink the 'Sync now' / 'Export from iCloud' button icons for balance.

  • Version.xcconfig: bump to 1.2.23 (build 20260606).

Xem chi tiết trên GitHub
